description: PROP-FEED-S2-008 uses Tier label "1" in the Sprint 3 proof obligations table (verification-architecture.md line 525), which is inconsistent with the Sprint 2 proof obligations that use descriptive tiers like "Rust unit" and "Rust integration" (lines 489-495). The Rust testing tier categorization in §5 Tooling Map (line 499) references Tier 1 as "example-based tests", and this is the TS-oriented definition. Having a parallel but differently-named tier system for Rust proofs ("Rust unit" vs "1") creates confusion about what verification rigor is expected.
remediationSuggestion: Use consistent tier labeling. Either rename all Sprint 2 Rust proof tiers to numeric (recommend treating Rust cargo test as a separate tier rather than Tier 1 which is defined for vitest/TypeScript) or use descriptive labels consistently ('Rust integration' for PROP-FEED-S2-008 to match PROP-FEED-S2-003/004).
